# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We want participation in YANC to be a friendly and respectful experience for
everyone, regardless of background or experience level.

## Our standards

Contributors are expected to:

- be respectful, patient, and welcoming toward others;
- assume good faith and keep discussion focused on the technical merits;
- give and accept constructive feedback gracefully.

Behaviour that makes the project an unwelcoming place — personal attacks,
sustained disruption, or harassment of any kind — is not acceptable. Maintainers
may edit, remove, or reject contributions and comments that violate this code,
and may temporarily or permanently ban any contributor for behaviour they
consider inappropriate.

## Scope

This applies in all project spaces (issues, pull requests, commit messages,
discussions) and when an individual is representing the project in public.

## Adopted standard

This project follows the **Contributor Covenant, version 2.1**. The full text,
including the detailed enforcement guidelines, is available at
<https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/>.

## Reporting

Report unacceptable behaviour to the maintainers at
<luciano.ma.filho@gmail.com>. All reports will be reviewed and handled
confidentially.
